summary: Tested P0 Radio DJ Double Echo Bug Fix, AI Richard Persistent Memory, and Radio Playlist Mixed Endpoint. All features working correctly. No double-echo detected in Radio player. AI Richard maintains conversation context across multiple messages.
critical_code_review_comments: Radio.js has correct single useEffect for track changes (line 124-129) - no duplicate play() calls
ai_richard.py correctly implements conversation persistence with MongoDB (lines 1161-1231)
Playlist mixed endpoint correctly returns 60 items (47 tracks + 13 announcements)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Radio player and AI Chat working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features tested and working. Radio DJ double-echo bug is fixed - only single useEffect triggers play(). AI Richard conversation persistence working correctly with MongoDB storage. Playlist mixed returns 60 items with announcements interspersed every 3 tracks.

radio_double_echo_bug_fix.details: Verified Radio.js has single useEffect for track changes (line 124-129). Console logs show single 'Loading' and 'Playing' calls per track change. No duplicate play() calls detected during track navigation.

radio_playlist_mixed_endpoint.details: GET /api/radio/playlist/mixed returns 60 items (47 tracks + 13 announcements). Announcements properly interspersed every 3 tracks.

ai_richard_conversation_persistence.details: AI Richard remembers user name and topic across multiple messages. Tested with 4-message conversation - context maintained correctly. MongoDB stores conversation history.

ai_richard_keyword_responses.details: Homepage and Page Two keyword shortcuts trigger instant responses without OpenAI API call.

frontend_radio_page.details: Radio page loads correctly, shows 'Track 1 of 60', play/pause/next buttons work, AI Richard avatar dances when music plays.

frontend_ai_chat_page.details: AI Chat page loads correctly, chat input works, responses display properly, free tier counter decrements correctly.

radio_double_echo_original_bug.symptom: User heard DJ announcements playing twice simultaneously ('This is Richard Johnson. This is Richard Johnson')
radio_double_echo_original_bug.root_cause: Previously had TWO useEffect hooks in Radio.js both calling .play() on currentTrackIndex change. The duplicate useEffect at lines 190-194 was removed.
radio_double_echo_original_bug.fix_verification: Verified Radio.js now has only ONE useEffect (lines 124-129) that triggers handlePlay(). Console logs during testing showed single 'Loading' and 'Playing' calls per track change.
